text:
The Concept of Gravity
Abstract
Gravity is a force that attracts objects toward each other. On Earth, it pulls objects toward the
planet's center.
Introduction
Gravity is one of the fundamental forces of nature. Isaac Newton explained that every object
attracts another object with gravitational force.
How Gravity Works
The strength of gravity depends on the mass of objects and the distance between them.
Gravity on Earth
Earth's gravity keeps objects on the ground and causes objects to fall when dropped.

s objects on the ground and causes objects to fall when dropped.
Gravity in Space
Gravity keeps planets in orbit around the Sun and moons orbiting planets.
Conclusion
Gravity controls motion in the universe and makes life on Earth possible.
